title: Court acquits former Nepal Telecom chief and 17 others in corruption case - The Kathmandu Post
description: Court acquits former Nepal Telecom chief and 17 others in corruption case  The Kathmandu Post
publisher.title: The Kathmandu Post
full_article:
The Special Court on Thursday acquitted then Nepal Telecom managing director Sunil Paudel and 17 others in a corruption case related to the state-owned telecom company’s billing system upgrade.



A bench of Special Court judges Narayan Prasad Paudel and Bidur Koirala cleared all 18 defendants, dismissing the corruption charges filed by the Commission for the Investigation of Abuse of Authority (CIAA).

The anti-graft agency had accused the defendants of colluding to commit large-scale financial irregularities during the procurement and upgrade of Nepal Telecom’s billing system.

The CIAA alleged that the accused had abused their official positions, causing significant financial losses to the state. It had sought Rs330 million in damages from the defendants.

Those acquitted include former managing director Paudel, Sangita Aryal (also known as Sangita Pahadi), Pratibha Shrestha (also known as Pratibha Baidya), Rajendra Shrestha, Jhavindra Lal Upadhyaya, Devendra Khatiwada, Binita Shrestha, Amul Pradhan, Rajiv Kumar KC, Hem Prabha Ram Pratap Karna (also known as Hem Prabha Karna), Nawal Chaudhary, Mukti Prasad Aryal, Santosh Kumar Shrestha and Parmatma Bhattarai, among others.
translated:
विशेष न्यायालय गुरुवार कए सरकारी दूरसंचार कंपनी क बिलिंग सिस्टम अपग्रेड स जुड़ल भ्रष्टाचार क मामला मे तत्कालीन नेपाल दूरसंचार प्रबंध निदेशक सुनील पौडेल आ 17 अन्य कए बरी क देलक अछि।



विशेष न्यायालय के न्यायाधीश नारायण प्रसाद पौडेल आरू बिदुर कोइराला के पीठ न॑ अधिकार के दुरुपयोग के जांच आयोग (सीआईएए) द्वारा दायर भ्रष्टाचार के आरोप क॑ खारिज करी क॑ सब १८ प्रतिवादी क॑ मंजूरी द॑ देलकै ।

भ्रष्टाचार विरोधी एजेंसी नेपाल दूरसंचार के बिलिंग प्रणाली के खरीद आ उन्नयन के दौरान प्रतिवादी सब पर मिलीभगत क पैघ पैमाना पर वित्तीय गड़बड़ी के आरोप लगौने छल।

सीआईएए के आरोप छै कि आरोपी न॑ अपनऽ आधिकारिक पद के दुरुपयोग करलकै, जेकरा स॑ राज्य क॑ काफी आर्थिक नुकसान पहुँचलै । ओ प्रतिवादी स 33 करोड़ टका क नुकसान क भरपाई मांगने छल।

बरी होबय वाला मे पूर्व प्रबंध निदेशक पौडेल, संगीता अर्यल (संगीता पहादी के नाम सं सेहो जानल जाइत अछि), प्रतिभा श्रेष्ठ (प्रतिभा बैद्य के नाम सं सेहो जानल जाइत अछि), राजेन्द्र श्रेष्ठ, झविन्द्र लाल उपाध्याय, देवेन्द्र खतिवाड़ा, बिनिता श्रेष्ठ, अमूल प्रधान, राजीव कुमार केसी, हेम प्रभा राम प्रताप कर्ण (जेकरा सेहो जानल जाइत अछि हेम प्रभा कर्ण के रूप में, नवल चौधरी, मुक्ति प्रसाद अर्यल, संतोष कुमार श्रेष्ठ एवं परमात्मा भट्टराई आदि।

title: India sees jump in foreign student enrolments; Nepal, UAE lead: AISHE report - The Tribune
description: India sees jump in foreign student enrolments; Nepal, UAE lead: AISHE report  The Tribune
publisher.title: The Tribune
full_article:
The total number of foreign students enrolled in higher education is 58,134, as per the report by the All India Survey on Higher Education (AISHE) 2023-24. This is a significant jump from 48,726 students in 2022-23 report. The data also points to the gap in the implementation of National Education Policy (NEP) 2020, six years after its launch.

The report says the foreign students have come from 173 different countries. In 2023-24, the highest share of foreign students was from Nepal (24.1%), followed by UAE (7.0%), United States (5.9%), Bangladesh (5.9%), Nigeria (5.5%), and Zimbabwe (4.0%).

The highest number of foreign students are enrolled in undergraduate courses (73.6%) followed by postgraduate courses (16.8%). 4,930 females and 27,849 males were enrolled in the undergraduate courses.

The report also shows maximum students have opted for Arts (32.1%), followed by science (13.5%), Engineering & Technology (12.9%) and Commerce (12.0%) in the UG level. At PG level, maximum students are enrolled in Social Science stream (18.6%) followed by Management (18.2%).

However, six years after the launch of NEP 2020, only 56% universities have introduced the 4-year UG Programme and only 58% have adopted the National Curriculum and Credit Framework for Undergraduate Programmes. While 49% universities are offering multiple entry and exit in academic programmes and only 6% have launched online programmes.

At the university level, there is an increase of 33.4% in enrolment from 2019-20 to 2023-24. Considering the type of the university, there is an increase of 23.5% enrolment in State public universities and 42.2% in Institutes of National Importance (INIs).

title: French Ambassador pays courtesy call on Vice President Yadav - The Rising Nepal
description: French Ambassador pays courtesy call on Vice President Yadav  The Rising Nepal
publisher.title: The Rising Nepal
full_article:
Kathmandu, July 9: French Ambassador to Nepal, Virginie Corteval, paid a courtesy call on Vice President Ramsahay Prasad Yadav on Thursday.

They discussed various issues relating to Nepal-France relations during the meeting, according to Vice President's secretariat.

Vice President Yadav said Nepal and France have been enjoying bilateral relations based on mutual respect, cooperation and friendship. Nepal's political movements are inspired by values of French revolution such as freedom and equality, he added.

Yadav extended gratitude to France for its support to Nepal via European Union. He wished peace, prosperity and happiness of the French President and people via the Ambassador on France's upcoming National Day.

On the occasion, Ambassador Corteval said efforts were made to bolster France-Nepal relations during her term. (RSS)
translated:
काठमांडू, ९ जुलै : नेपालमे रहल फ्रांसके राजदूत वर्जिनी कोर्टेवल बृहस्पतिदिन उपराष्ट्रपति रामसहाय प्रसाद यादवसँग शिष्टाचार भेंट केलन्हि ।

बैसारमे नेपाल-फ्रांस सम्बन्धसँ जुड़ल विभिन्न विषयमे चर्चा कएल गेल उपराष्ट्रपति सचिवालय जनौलक अछि ।

उपराष्ट्रपति यादव नेपाल आ फ्रांस आपसी सम्मान, सहयोग आ मित्रता पर आधारित द्विपक्षीय सम्बन्ध मे रहल बतौलनि । नेपाल के राजनीतिक आन्दोलन फ्रांसीसी क्रांति के स्वतन्त्रता आ समानता जैसनऽ मूल्यऽ स॑ प्रेरित छै, हुनी आरू कहलकै ।

यादव यूरोपीय संघ के माध्यम स नेपाल के सहयोग के लेल फ्रांस के आभार व्यक्त केलनि। हुनी फ्रांस केरऽ आबै वाला राष्ट्रीय दिवस प॑ राजदूत के माध्यम स॑ फ्रांस केरऽ राष्ट्रपति आरू जनता के शांति, समृद्धि आरू सुख के कामना करलकै ।

एहि अवसर पर राजदूत कोर्टेवल कहला जे हुनकर कार्यकाल मे फ्रांस-नेपाल संबंध कए मजबूत करबाक प्रयास कैल गेल अछि। (आर एस एस) २.
